markdown_heading: AUTH-104 — Account lockout after repeated failures
change_summary: Lock an account after N failed logins within a window, with tenant-scoped thresholds and an audit entry.
critical_invariants: Lockout thresholds are tenant-configurable and never leak across tenants.
A locked account always emits an audit event on lock and on unlock.
requirement_closure: Ticket ask: Account lockout after repeated failed logins with tenant-scoped thresholds (account-security).
Implemented (in progress): failure-counter with sliding window and tenant threshold lookup; lock/unlock audit wiring underway.
repo_gates: cd backend && npm run build [result=pass; attribution=clean] - tsc clean (partial)

self_review_cycles.findings: threshold compared with >=; sliding window unit-tested
uniform response on lock; thresholds keyed per tenant
